channel.title: Ai on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: traininglogs
item.description: A Python pipeline that parses free-text training session logs into a structured NoSQL/JSON schema. Includes dataclass models, a CLI, and an agent layer for AI-assisted log intake.

item.title: Building traininglogs: A Python Pipeline for My Gym Data
item.description: How and why I built a parser that turns my messy training notes into structured JSON.
